# Scott Hamilton, PhD

[SOCIAL SCIENTIST & PROFESSOR]{.subtitle}

::: social-icons
[{{< fa brands github >}}](https://github.com/you)
[{{< fa brands linkedin >}}](https://linkedin.com/in/you)
[{{< fa envelope >}}](mailto:you@email.com)

I am a sociologist with a passion for statistics, social media analytics, and the study of identity. My **research** focuses on how data shapes and reflects social behavior, particularly in digital spaces. My **projects** explore the intersection of data and storytelling.
